privileged_info_summary: The OpenFlights airport database is a real, publicly available dataset hosted on GitHub (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jpatokal/openflights/master/data/airports.dat) under the Open Database License. The current dataset contains 7698 airports representing 237 distinct countries across 307 IANA timezone identifiers. The metadata ranges (airports: 6000-9000, countries: 200-260) accurately accommodate the actual data. The task requires normalizing this denormalized flat table into a proper 3NF schema with three normalized tables (countries, timezones, airports) and validating the data migration through a report file.
